title: How to build reliable software with AI agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech video featuring Smitha Kolan and Addy Osmani discussing how to maintain software reliability when using AI coding agents. Argues that human-in-the-loop verification and rigorous code review processes are essential to ensure AI agents reduce technical debt rather than increase maintenance costs.
writeup: Smitha Kolan and Addy Osmani discuss how to keep software reliable when AI coding agents generate code. The central argument: human-in-the-loop verification and rigorous code review remain essential, so that agents reduce technical debt instead of raising long-term maintenance costs. The takeaway is that AI-assisted code generation needs disciplined human oversight to be a net positive for reliability.
